steps.t: Make your way down the hilltop and toward the inner courtyard of Dun Shûma with Mizâdi.
Make your way toward the inner courtyard of Dun Shûma with Mizâdi.
Defeat Ekhamâti forces and treat the wounded Subuzûri at Dun Shûma.
Enter the inner courtyard of Dun Shûma.
Speak with Mizâdi in Dun Shûma.
